---
name: Compatibility report
about: Report whether the app works with your iSmartGate or GogoGate2 hardware
title: "[Compat] <model> firmware <version>"
labels: compatibility
---

**Hardware**
- Model: <!-- e.g. iSmartGate PRO / LITE / MINI / GogoGate2 -->
- Firmware version: <!-- shown in the iSmartGate app under Settings -->
- Number of doors configured:
- Sensor type per door: <!-- wired / wireless tilt / none -->

**Network**
- Pairing method that worked: <!-- UDI / mDNS / manual IP -->
- Homey model: <!-- Homey Pro 2023, Pro early-2019, etc. -->

**What works**
- [ ] Pairing
- [ ] Open from Homey
- [ ] Close from Homey
- [ ] State updates when door opens physically
- [ ] State updates when door closes physically
- [ ] "Door opened" trigger
- [ ] "Door closed" trigger
- [ ] "Left open" trigger
- [ ] Temperature (wireless sensor)
- [ ] Battery (wireless sensor)

**What doesn't**

<!-- describe -->
